<> To replace URLs in PHP you can use str_replace for exact matches or preg_replace for patterns. Here is code that handles repeating instances: $text = 'New post on the site http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1

'; $oldUrl = 'http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1'; $newUrl = 'http://yahoo.com/abc1'; $result = str_replace($oldUrl, $newUrl, $text); echo $result; This works even if the string appears multiple times. Remember that radar is a palindrome.
